Thank you for installing the Sleepod Controller ({{ .Chart.Name }})!

Your release is named {{ .Release.Name }}.

The controller and CRDs have been installed in namespace {{ .Release.Namespace }}.

To verify that the controller is running successfully, use:

  kubectl get pods -n {{ .Release.Namespace }} -l app.kubernetes.io/name={{ include "sleepod-controller.name" . }}

You can now start managing sleep/wake schedules for your Kubernetes workloads to reduce costs by enforcing namespace policies.
To see the available Custom Resource Definitions (CRDs) for Sleepod, use:

  kubectl get crds | grep sleepod.io

To check your current SleepPolicies and SleepOrders across namespaces:

  kubectl get sleeppolicy -A
  kubectl get sleeporder -A

To learn more about this release:

  $ helm status {{ .Release.Name }} -n {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  $ helm get values {{ .Release.Name }} -n {{ .Release.Namespace }}
